mapper.select: SELECT store_id, name, address, phone, opened_at, is_active AS active, created_at FROM stores WHERE is_active = 1 ORDER BY store_id
SELECT store_id, name, address, phone, opened_at, is_active AS active, created_at FROM stores WHERE store_id = #{storeId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO stores (name, address, phone, opened_at) VALUES (#{name}, #{address}, #{phone}, #{openedAt})
mapper.update: UPDATE stores SET name = #{name}, address = #{address}, phone = #{phone} WHERE store_id = #{storeId}
mapper.select: SELECT s.staff_id, s.store_id, s.name, s.phone, s.role, s.is_active AS active, s.created_at, st.name AS store_name FROM staff s JOIN stores st ON s.store_id = st.store_id WHERE s.staff_id = #{staffId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO staff (store_id, name, phone, role) VALUES (#{storeId}, #{name}, #{phone}, #{role})
mapper.update: UPDATE staff SET name = #{name}, phone = #{phone} WHERE staff_id = #{staffId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO auth_users (staff_id, username, hashed_password) VALUES (#{staffId}, #{username}, #{hashedPassword})
INSERT INTO auth_users (staff_id, username, hashed_password, is_active) VALUES (#{staffId}, #{username}, #{hashedPassword}, 0)
mapper.select: SELECT au.user_id, au.staff_id, au.username, au.hashed_password, au.last_login, au.is_active AS active, s.role, s.store_id, s.name AS staff_name FROM auth_users au JOIN staff s ON au.staff_id = s.staff_id WHERE au.username = #{username} AND au.is_active = 1

SELECT au.user_id, au.staff_id, au.username, au.hashed_password, au.last_login, au.is_active AS active, s.role, s.store_id, s.name AS staff_name FROM auth_users au JOIN staff s ON au.staff_id = s.staff_id WHERE au.user_id = #{userId}
mapper.update: UPDATE auth_users SET last_login = GETDATE() WHERE user_id = #{userId}
UPDATE auth_users SET hashed_password = #{hashedPassword} WHERE staff_id = #{staffId}
mapper.select: SELECT au.user_id, au.staff_id, au.username, au.is_active AS active, s.name AS staff_name, s.role, s.store_id, st.name AS store_name FROM auth_users au JOIN staff s ON au.staff_id = s.staff_id JOIN stores st ON s.store_id = st.store_id WHERE au.is_active = 0 ORDER BY au.user_id DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE auth_users SET is_active = 1 WHERE user_id = #{userId}
